introSection: Clipper was a wooden roller coaster built by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters, Inc.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened in 1937.

It closed in 1946 because of low popularity compared to other rides at the park and was replaced by Shooting Star, which reused the lift hill, station, and final helix from Clipper.

fullText:
Clipper was a wooden roller coaster built by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters, Inc.

The ride opened in 1937.

It closed in 1946 because of low popularity compared to other rides at the park and was replaced by Shooting Star, which reused the lift hill, station, and final helix from Clipper.
